# 🪛 Generic / Task Pull Request

## Related Issue
- Link the issue(s) this PR addresses:
  Closes #<issue_number>

## Description
- What task or work is being completed?
- Why is this change needed?
- What does it achieve in the system?
- Additional context for reviewers:

## Changes

### Implementation
- Changes made to complete the task:
  - Step 1
  - Step 2

### Dependencies
- Added / Updated / Removed (if any)

### Compatibility
- Backward compatibility:
  - [ ] Yes
  - [ ] No (explain below)

## Testing

### Verification
- [ ] Manual testing performed
- [ ] Changes verified locally
- [ ] No unintended side effects are observed

### Automated Tests
- [ ] Unit / integration tests are added (if applicable)
- [ ] All CI checks pass

## Documentation
- [ ] Documentation updated (if relevant)
- [ ] Changelog updated (if applicable)

## Checklist
- [ ] Issue linked
- [ ] Task clearly described
- [ ] No unrelated changes are included
- [ ] Code follows FireHub standards

## Risks / Impact
- Risk level:
  - [ ] None
  - [ ] Low
  - [ ] Medium
  - [ ] High

### Potential Impact
- Side effects:
  - ...

### Areas Requiring Attention
- ...

## Notes

### Technical Notes
- ...

### Reviewer Notes
- Additional context, logs, or instructions
